targets.label: PubMed
targets.rationale: Use PubMed automatic term mapping for broad discovery, then verify MeSH translations and title/abstract text-word coverage.
warnings: Confirm preferred MeSH headings in PubMed Search Details or the MeSH database before using this as a final literature strategy.
Quoted phrases, field tags, and wildcards can change PubMed automatic term mapping behavior.

targets.label: FHIR search
targets.rationale: Use FHIR resource-specific search parameters first and fall back to text search only when structured fields are unavailable.
warnings: This is a template only; replace placeholders with validated identifiers, codes, and dates.
FHIR servers vary in which optional resource search parameters they implement.

targets.label: LOINC Search API
targets.rationale: Use LOINC terminology search to resolve lab identity before normalization, mapping, or FHIR Observation coding.
warnings: LOINC Search API authentication is required; do not send PHI or patient identifiers in terminology search strings.
There is no single all-area LOINC search endpoint; select the LOINC, answer list, part, or group scope that matches the task.

targets.label: UCUM validation
targets.rationale: Use UCUM validation for unit strings before unit conversion, canonical mapping, or downstream clinical data transformation.
warnings: Validate the original unit string before conversion and preserve it for audit.
UCUM validation says whether a code is valid; it does not determine clinical appropriateness for a specific lab result.

targets.label: CDC ICD-10-CM
targets.rationale: Use CDC/NCHS ICD-10-CM as the official U.S. diagnosis-coding reference before treating diagnosis codes as workflow evidence.
warnings: Do not assign final ICD-10-CM codes from retrieval alone; coder or clinician review is required.
Preserve source diagnosis text and coding confidence when mapping problem-list data.

targets.label: SNOMED CT browser
targets.rationale: Use SNOMED CT clinical-finding terminology to ground problem-list concepts before mapping or FHIR Condition coding.
warnings: SNOMED CT access and licensing can vary by jurisdiction; verify permitted use for the deployment.
Terminology lookup evidence is not a diagnosis or treatment recommendation.

targets.label: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2
targets.rationale: Use ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 for trial-context retrieval by condition, intervention, recruitment status, and eligibility fields.
warnings: Trial status and eligibility can change; verify the API version and dataTimestamp before using results in a workflow.
Trial records provide research context and are not clinical treatment recommendations.

targets.label: openFDA drug label
targets.rationale: Use openFDA drug labeling for public regulatory label context, boxed-warning review, and current label text retrieval.
warnings: openFDA label data is public regulatory information, not clinical advice.
Verify effective_time, product identity, and active ingredient before citing a label record.

targets.label: openFDA adverse event
targets.rationale: Use openFDA adverse event reports for public FAERS signal context after medication identity is normalized.
warnings: FAERS/openFDA adverse event reports are spontaneous reports and cannot establish causality or incidence.
Use adverse-event counts as signal context only, with source and date provenance.
